privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie tutorial dataset (White River, Indiana) for HEC-RAS. The expected output locations are verified to be /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/lateral_shear_analysis.csv for the CSV file and /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/high_shear_zones.txt for the summary file. The source HDF5 model output file generated for this plan is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.hdf.
